hero.title: Ship small apps without a database.
hero.subtitle: Vite + React 19 + Clerk, with an opinionated modular structure and a typed contract end-to-end.

dashboard.intro: This is the home for authenticated users. From here you can wire up API endpoints, add your own modules, or ship the landing page as-is.

api.title: API client ready
api.body: A typed axios instance lives at @/shared/lib/api. Point VITE_API_BASE_URL at any HTTP endpoint.

i18n.title: 3 languages
i18n.body: EN, ES, and DK ship with the template. Add more by dropping a new file in shared/lib/i18n/locales/.

modules.title: Modular structure
modules.body: Each feature lives in src/modules/<name>/ with a manifest. The registry wires them into the sidebar.
